connectorUiConfig.title: Bitsight Risk Findings (via Codeless Connector Framework)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: Ingests Bitsight Security Ratings risk-vector findings for a portfolio company into Microsoft Sentinel using the Codeless Connector Framework. Migrated from the Bitsight Risk Vector Azure Function solution.

sampleQueries.query:
BitsightRiskFindings_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by finding_uid
| where normalized_risk_state in ('warn','bad')
| order by TimeGenerated desc

sampleQueries.description: Findings by risk vector and state
sampleQueries.query:
BitsightRiskFindings_CL
| summarize Findings=count() by normalized_risk_state, risk_vector_label

dataTypes.name: BitsightRiskFindings_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
BitsightRiskFindings_CL
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

customs.name: Bitsight API token
customs.description: A Bitsight API token with access to the target portfolio company is required. Generate it from Account > API Tokens in the Bitsight console.

customs.name: Company GUID
customs.description: The Bitsight company GUID whose findings will be ingested. One connection ingests one company.

instructionSteps.title: Connect BitSight Risk Findings (via Codeless Connector Framework) to Microsoft Sentinel
instructionSteps.description: Provide the BitSight company GUID and API token, then select Connect. One connection ingests findings for one company.
